title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 452.895 - Recognition and enforcement
text:
452.895.  Recognition and enforcement. — A court of this state shall accord full faith and credit to an order made consistently with sections 452.700 to 452.930 which enforces a child custody determination by a court of another state unless the order has been vacated, stayed or modified by a court authorized to do so under sections 452.740 to 452.845.
(L. 2009 H.B. 481)
